known_issues: Repeated deployment errors when going live (production deployment fails consistently)

new_feature_requests.summary: Investigate and resolve the recurring production deployment error. Audit the backend Motoko actor (backend/main.mo) for any syntax errors, type mismatches, or unstable type issues that would cause the canister build or upgrade to fail. Ensure the actor compiles cleanly and all stable variable declarations are valid.

Audit the frontend build configuration (vite config, tsconfig, tailwind config, index.html, package.json) for any issues that would cause the production build to fail — such as missing environment variables, broken imports, type errors, or invalid asset references. Ensure the frontend builds cleanly for production.
